evals.prompt: Review this Figma design for code generation readiness: https://www.figma.com/design/xCXS2KIjdicRExYRFNPfOL/WMP-Gifting?node-id=2422-61194&m=dev. Give me a detailed audit report with issues and scores.
evals.expected_output: A structured report covering 9 categories with P0-P3 severity issues, a score out of 100, and a Quick Fix Checklist. Should attempt to call get_metadata, get_variable_defs, get_design_context.
expectations: Report includes a Methodology section listing MCP tools used (get_metadata, get_variable_defs, etc.)

Report mentions all 9 categories by exact name: File & Layer Organization, Naming Conventions, Layout Structure, Component Usage, Typography, Color & Style Tokens, Images Icons & Assets, State Completeness, MCP/Codegen Readiness
The score is expressed as X/100 (not /10 or /20)
Report includes P0-P3 severity levels with dedicated sections
Report includes a Positive Findings section
Report includes a Quick Fix Checklist
An HTML report file (report.html) is generated alongside report.md
Each issue cites specific evidence from MCP tool output (node IDs, names, or coordinates)

evals.prompt: 帮我检查一下这个Figma设计文件是否符合开发规范: https://www.figma.com/design/xCXS2KIjdicRExYRFNPfOL/WMP-Gifting?node-id=2422-61113&m=dev 这个是一个多页面的section，请全部检查。
evals.expected_output: Should detect multi-page section, create pipeline.md to track pages, use pipeline-based workflow for parallel audits, and generate summary HTML.
expectations: The agent detects this is a multi-page section and reports the number of pages found
A pipeline.md file is created in the reports/ directory to track page evaluation status
The pipeline.md contains sections for pending and completed pages
The report contains a per-page scores table with page names and individual scores
The report includes a Cross-Page Issues section
The score uses /100 scale for both overall and per-page scores
Report includes a Methodology section listing MCP tools used
A summary HTML file (summary.html) is generated for multi-page output

evals.prompt: Quick design lint on this Figma page please: https://www.figma.com/design/xCXS2KIjdicRExYRFNPfOL/WMP-Gifting?node-id=2422-61201&m=dev — just the basics, is it ready for code gen?
evals.expected_output: Single-page audit. Should still cover all 9 categories even though user said 'just the basics'. Should generate both report.md and report.html.
expectations: The agent audits all 9 categories by exact name despite casual request phrasing
The agent generates report.md with full structured content
The agent generates report.html
The score is out of 100
Severity levels P0-P3 are used with dedicated sections
No categories are skipped or merged due to the casual tone of the request
